title: Sorel-Tracy Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Sorel-Tracy with a Z-Score of -3.83. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The city is experiencing extremely low temperatures, resulting in a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 14.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 77%, and the wind speed is moderate at 10.0 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, causing significant disruptions to daily life.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
